sentences.text: Hans was leaning on his spade and smiled widely as he replied, 'Good morning.'
The Miller asked Hans how he had been during the winter.
Hans was pleased and said, 'It's very kind of you to ask, really very kind.'
He admitted that he had a difficult time, but now spring was here.
